user_question: Review whether the account activity needs escalation.
llm_output: The account should be approved because the business has active transaction volume. No manual review is needed.

evidence.text: The stated business profile indicates low monthly volume and local-only trading.
Recent activity includes high transaction volume and cross-border counterparties.

policy_rules.text: Transaction volume that conflicts with stated profile should trigger manual review.
Cross-border counterparty mismatch should be escalated.
